reviews.comment:
Es buena estación de servicio u casi la mejor de la ruta le pongo tres estrellas porque el playero después de hacer toda la cola no nos quiso cargar combustible porque dice que no cruza la manguera y tuvimos que hacer toda la cola nuevamente eso no me.paso en ninguna YPF del resto de toda la provincia

(Translated by Google)
It's a good service station, almost the best on the route. I give it three stars because after waiting in line, the gas station attendant didn't want to fill up our tank because he said the hose wouldn't fit and we had to wait in line again. That didn't happen to me at any YPF station in the rest of the province.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHa2VTTjd3RRAB
